title: Brand intro animation reveals interactive landing content
description: Verifies the intro animation plays on load and the landing page becomes interactive afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the page load animation to complete
Verify the main landing content is revealed
Verify primary navigation and call-to-action controls are usable

title: Brand intro fallback shows static hero when animation cannot run
description: Verifies an accessible static hero and usable navigation are present when motion is reduced (acting as a safe fallback path).

steps.description: Set the system preference to reduced motion
Navigate to /
Verify a static hero section is displayed
Verify primary navigation remains usable

title: Brand intro does not block interaction after completion
description: Verifies the intro does not leave an overlay that prevents interaction with landing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the page load animation to complete
Scroll down the landing page
Verify the page continues to respond to scrolling and interactions

title: Services catalog loads and displays service details
description: Verifies the services grid renders with key service information visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services section
Verify a services grid is displayed
Verify services show titles, durations, and prices

title: Filter services by category updates the grid
description: Verifies category filtering changes the visible set of services.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services section
Select a service category filter
Verify the services grid updates to show services matching the selected category

title: Changing service category filter is reversible
description: Verifies users can switch filters and return to an unfiltered/all-services view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services section
Select a service category filter
Select the all-categories option
Verify the services grid shows the full set of services again

title: Initiate booking from a chosen service
description: Verifies a user can start booking from the services catalog and reach service selection with the chosen service context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services section
Initiate booking for a service from the services grid
Verify the booking flow opens at the service selection step
Verify the chosen service is selected or reflected in the booking flow

title: Complete booking flow with success confirmation
description: Verifies the end-to-end booking flow completes and shows a confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate booking
Select one or more services
Choose a valid date via the custom calendar
Fill a valid name into the name field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Select a communication preference
Submit booking
Verify a processing state is shown before completion
Verify a booking confirmation success state is displayed

title: Booking validation blocks submission when required contact details are missing
description: Verifies missing required contact details trigger validation feedback and can be corrected to complete booking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate booking
Select one or more services
Choose a valid date via the custom calendar
Submit booking
Verify validation feedback highlights missing required fields
Fill a valid name into the name field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Select a communication preference
Submit booking
Verify a booking confirmation success state is displayed

title: Booking cannot proceed without selecting a service
description: Verifies service selection is required before moving forward in booking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate booking
Attempt to continue without selecting any services
Verify a validation message indicates a service selection is required
Verify the user remains on the service selection step

title: Browse portfolio slider and view a project in the gallery modal
description: Verifies users can browse the portfolio slider, open a project in the gallery modal, and close it to return to browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the portfolio slider section
Drag/scroll the studio work slider to browse projects
Click an image in the slider to open the gallery modal
Verify a full-screen gallery modal is displayed with a project image
Close the gallery modal
Verify the portfolio slider is visible and can be browsed

title: Lazy-load placeholders and retry when full-size images are slow or fail
description: Verifies the gallery experience shows placeholders during image loading and provides a retry path to view the full image.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the portfolio slider section
Click an image in the slider to open the gallery modal
Wait for the full-size image area to begin loading
Verify a lazy-loaded placeholder is displayed while the full-size image is not yet available
Use the retry option to attempt loading the full-size image again
Verify the full-size project image is displayed or the placeholder state remains available for further retry

title: Portfolio slider loads primary content on the landing page
description: Verifies the portfolio slider section renders and is interactable after initial page load.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the portfolio slider section
Verify multiple studio work items are displayed in a horizontal slider
Drag/scroll the studio work slider slightly
Verify additional studio work items become visible as the slider moves

title: Open and close gallery modal without losing slider context
description: Verifies closing the gallery modal returns the user to the portfolio slider browsing context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the portfolio slider section
Drag/scroll the studio work slider to a different set of projects
Click an image in the currently visible set to open the gallery modal
Close the gallery modal
Verify the portfolio slider remains visible in the same general browsing position (the previously viewed set is still on screen)

title: Gallery modal displays responsive full-screen media across viewport sizes
description: Verifies the gallery modal adapts to viewport changes while keeping the media visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the portfolio slider section
Click an image in the slider to open the gallery modal
Verify the gallery modal content fits within the viewport without requiring horizontal scrolling
Resize the browser to a narrower mobile-like width
Verify the gallery modal remains full-screen and the image remains visible within the viewport

title: Slider interaction remains functional after closing the modal
description: Verifies the slider can still be dragged/scrolled after the gallery modal has been opened and closed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the portfolio slider section
Click an image in the slider to open the gallery modal
Close the gallery modal
Drag/scroll the studio work slider again
Verify the slider continues to move and new project items become visible

title: Modal can be dismissed via keyboard escape
description: Verifies the gallery modal supports a standard keyboard dismissal interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the portfolio slider section
Click an image in the slider to open the gallery modal
Press Escape
Verify the gallery modal is closed
Verify the portfolio slider is visible for continued browsing
